title: NiiVue Heuristic Definition
description: Declarative heuristic that auto-populates a workflow context field via a chain of operations

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor support

description.description: Human-readable description of what this heuristic computes

preserveExisting.description: If true, return the existing context value when it is non-empty (preserves user edits)

source.description: Dot-path to the initial data source: inputs.X or context.Y (including _stepOutputs_*)

operations.description: Ordered chain of data transformations applied to the source value

output.description: Type of the final output value

field.description: Dot-path to the field within each item (for filter, sort, group-by, etc.)

value.description: Comparison value (for filter), default value (for default op), or template string

fields.description: Field names to pick (for pick-fields) or to merge (for merge)

contextField.description: Dot-path to a context field for lookup operations

targetField.description: Field name to write to on each item (for set-field)

template.description: Template string with {{field}} placeholders (for template op)

description.description: Optional human-readable label for this operation
